import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 13 or c == 10
        if not string.is_empty(current)
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sorted_insert(_ xs: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(xs, x)
    xs
  else
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    for y in xs
      if not inserted and x < y
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, y)
    end
    if not inserted
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
    result
  end
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums1 = parse_line(line1)
let nums2 = parse_line(line2)

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
for x in nums1
  sorted = sorted_insert(sorted, x)
end
for x in nums2
  sorted = sorted_insert(sorted, x)
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for x in sorted
  if first
    out = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{x}"
  end
end
println(out)
